title: first contact
text: The screen waits. You touch it, and the dark learns how to move.

title: first flow
text: A stream that no hand pushes is still a confession of hands.

title: research opens
text: Knowledge is not light here. It is a sharper darkness.

title: first reboot
text: You wake where you began, carrying one impossible line from the old world.

title: ten cores
text: The machine stops counting your requests and starts predicting your hunger.

title: deep source
text: Every line you write removes a wall. Every wall removed reveals another author.
